## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      2 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jul 18, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _L_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "those who say that the messages are unlimited for free are paid for reviews/ written before it started to be paid for. you have a limit, then you have to pay. the characters' answers don't make sense, they're illogical and stupid. plus I've spent all my free messages at fixing bugs - each time I log into the app there is different answer chosen, not the one I picked, and it affects the entire conversation. I scroll through answers for an hour just to discover a few messages above there's a bug."

## **Pricing and paywall** {#theme-pricing_paywall}

   **Pricing and paywall.**
      6 recent review(s) mention pricing and paywall.
      Review window: Jul 18, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention price, subscriptions, or paywalls. This can signal pricing sensitivity in the niche.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _L_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "those who say that the messages are unlimited for free are paid for reviews/ written before it started to be paid for. you have a limit, then you have to pay. the characters' answers don't make sense, they're illogical and stupid. plus I've spent all my free messages at fixing bugs - each time I log into the app there is different answer chosen, not the one I picked, and it affects the entire conversation. I scroll through answers for an hour just to discover a few messages above there's a bug."
            2. _Jushi Buti_, Jul 19, 2026, 2/5: "I've been subscribed fpr more than two weeks with no gems for the daily log in. I dont know if its because I canceled my subscription for a day or two but after that I just got regular log in rewards but Im still paying for 500 a day?"
            3. _Caleb Sidders_, Jul 19, 2026, 2/5: "newest update totally killed the "mica" level chat essentially forcing you into using the more expensive levels. shameless cash grab significantly drops the rating"

## **Ads pressure** {#theme-ads}

   **Ads pressure.**
      4 recent review(s) mention ads pressure.
      Review window: Jul 17, 2026 - Jul 19, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are noticing ad pressure. This can signal monetization friction and an opening for a cleaner competitor.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _James Snowall_, Jul 19, 2026, 1/5: "I was so hoping to keep the 5 star rating, all these BOT replies..smh the truth is as follows- 1)Responses are 2 setneces with one vague action proc before the sentences on most energy funded chat models 2)Half the time the ads for gems dont reward 3) Minors image use and video creation to reveal things they shouldn't are making this app a HOTSPOT for predators to indulge fantasies they shouldn't 4)The discord mods=Useless !!do not reccomend!!"
            2. _N H_, Jul 17, 2026, 1/5: "App was great but the recent update killed it. its utterly useless now, the chats are incoherent and you get spammed with ads every couple messages. Not worth your time."

## **Feature requests** {#theme-feature_requests}

   **Feature requests.**
      2 recent review(s) mention feature requests.
      Review window: Jul 18, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users are asking for missing capabilities. This can reveal roadmap opportunities.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Brett Chandler-Finch_, Jul 18, 2026, 3/5: "great game i don't even mind the ads i just wish the ad wouldnt lock up i have to completely close and reopen the app even after waiting a couple of minutes and clicking on the ads]"
